---
title: "Mrs Bartram"
---

## Mrs Bartram

### Description

correspondent of CMY

### Biography

Since CMY indicates she wrote from Ramsgate Vicarage, she was presumably the wife of the Rev. Canon Harry Bartram, Vicar of Ramsgate.

### Letters

- [To Mary Elizabeth Sumner, Feb 10th 1899](../letters/3396_To_Mary_Elizabeth_Sumner.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
